name: fn-analytics
description: Form Now production operations analytics — local-only cockpit reading Formlabs Redash

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "MOCK=1 npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w web
scripts.start:mock: MOCK=1 NODE_ENV=production npm run start -w server
